{#daSA#}¦ {@1@} The threads at the end of
a piece of woven cloth, the fringe
of a garment, the skirt, edge or
hem of a garment; {#raktAMSukaM#} <lbinfo n="pavanalo#ladaSaM"/>
{#pavanaloladaSaM vahaMtI#} <ls>Mk. 1. 20</ls>; {#CinnA#} <lbinfo n="ivAMbara#pawasya"/>
{#ivAMbarapawasya daSAH pataMti#} <ls n="Mk.">5. 4.</ls> {@--2@} The
wick of a lamp; <ls>Bh. 3. 129</ls>;  <lbinfo n="ls:Ku.+4"/>
<ls>Ku. 4. 30</ls>. {@--3@} Age or time of life;
see {#daSAMta#} below. {@--4@} A period or
stage of life; as {#bAlya, yOvana#}, &c.;
<ls>R. 5. 40.</ls> {@--5@} A period in general.
{@--6@} State, condition, circumstances;
{#nIcErgacCatyupari ca daSA cakranAmaMkraMmaMRa#} 
[Page0560-b+ 56]
<ls>Me. 109</ls>; {#vizamAM hi daSAM prApya dEvaM#} <lbinfo n="ga#rhayate"/>
{#garhayate naraH#} <ls>H. 4. 3.</ls> {@--7@} State or <lbinfo n="con+dition"/>
condition of mind. {@--8@} The result of
actions, fate. {@--9@} The aspect or <lbinfo n="po+sition"/>
position of planets (at birth). {@--10@}
The mind, understanding. {@--Comp.@}
{#--aDipatiH, --ISaH#} the sun; (for other
meanings see under {#daSan#}). {#--aMtaH#}
{1} the end of a wick. {2} the end
of life; {#nirvizwavizayasnehaH sa#} <lbinfo n="daSAMtamupe#yivAn"/>
{#daSAMtamupeyivAn#} <ls>R. 12. 1</ls> (where the word is
used in both senses). {#--aMtaraM#} different
states, vicissitudes of life; <ls>Ś. 4. 1.</ls>  <lbinfo n="--aM#taraH"/>
{#--aMtaraH#} a lamp. {#--karzaH, --karzin#} {%<ab>m.</ab>%} {1} the
end of a garment. {2} a lamp.  <lbinfo n="--pA#kaH"/>
{#--pAkaH, --vipAkaH#} {1} the fulfilment of
fate. {2} a changed condition of life.
{#--viparyAsaH#} ill-luck, misfortune.
